## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss SEO progress, technical issues, and explore alternative strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/R8SHzeue7Q24isy7Y8H4p-Ey_pikbokS?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance for Firework's blog is significantly underperforming (60-70 clicks) despite 100 published articles](https://fathom.video/share/R8SHzeue7Q24isy7Y8H4p-Ey_pikbokS?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [Technical SEO issues, particularly with WordPress, are suspected to be a major factor in poor performance](https://fathom.video/share/R8SHzeue7Q24isy7Y8H4p-Ey_pikbokS?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [GrowthX proposes testing content on Webflow to isolate CMS impact on SEO](https://fathom.video/share/R8SHzeue7Q24isy7Y8H4p-Ey_pikbokS?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Alternative strategies (backlinks, ad runs) proposed to compensate for SEO underperformance](https://fathom.video/share/R8SHzeue7Q24isy7Y8H4p-Ey_pikbokS?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)

## Topics

### Current SEO Performance

  - [Blog traffic is only 40-50 visitors out of 300-400 total site visitors (≈10%)](https://fathom.video/share/R8SHzeue7Q24isy7Y8H4p-Ey_pikbokS?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Search Console data shows declining clicks over the past 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/R8SHzeue7Q24isy7Y8H4p-Ey_pikbokS?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [GrowthX expresses concern, as this performance is atypical compared to other clients (15,000-20,000 clicks/day)](https://fathom.video/share/R8SHzeue7Q24isy7Y8H4p-Ey_pikbokS?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)

### Technical SEO Recommendations

  - [GrowthX hired technical SEO specialists to address issues](https://fathom.video/share/R8SHzeue7Q24isy7Y8H4p-Ey_pikbokS?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Focus on page speed and template changes across all articles](https://fathom.video/share/R8SHzeue7Q24isy7Y8H4p-Ey_pikbokS?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Jorge (dev team) pushed changes to production instead of staging, creating complications](https://fathom.video/share/R8SHzeue7Q24isy7Y8H4p-Ey_pikbokS?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)

### WordPress vs. Webflow Testing

  - [Proposal to test content on Webflow to isolate CMS impact on SEO](https://fathom.video/share/R8SHzeue7Q24isy7Y8H4p-Ey_pikbokS?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Jorge suggests a leaner WordPress version as a quicker solution](https://fathom.video/share/R8SHzeue7Q24isy7Y8H4p-Ey_pikbokS?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [GrowthX emphasizes need for testing ground, even with minimal implementation (H1s and H2s only)](https://fathom.video/share/R8SHzeue7Q24isy7Y8H4p-Ey_pikbokS?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)

### Alternative Strategies

  - [GrowthX proposes kickstarting backlinks and ad run programs](https://fathom.video/share/R8SHzeue7Q24isy7Y8H4p-Ey_pikbokS?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Offered list of 25,000 Shopify stores for targeted outreach](https://fathom.video/share/R8SHzeue7Q24isy7Y8H4p-Ey_pikbokS?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Aim to drive sales and implementations while diagnosing SEO issues](https://fathom.video/share/R8SHzeue7Q24isy7Y8H4p-Ey_pikbokS?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Future Website Migration

  - [Firework planning migration to Webflow in medium term](https://fathom.video/share/R8SHzeue7Q24isy7Y8H4p-Ey_pikbokS?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide comprehensive SEO checklist for migration](https://fathom.video/share/R8SHzeue7Q24isy7Y8H4p-Ey_pikbokS?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [Key considerations: maintaining URL structures and internal links](https://fathom.video/share/R8SHzeue7Q24isy7Y8H4p-Ey_pikbokS?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jorge to investigate setting up a test environment (Webflow or lean WordPress)](https://fathom.video/share/R8SHzeue7Q24isy7Y8H4p-Ey_pikbokS?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Jimmy to reach out to John regarding ad strategy and implementation](https://fathom.video/share/R8SHzeue7Q24isy7Y8H4p-Ey_pikbokS?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide SEO migration checklist for future Webflow transition](https://fathom.video/share/R8SHzeue7Q24isy7Y8H4p-Ey_pikbokS?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [Jimmy to formalize alternative program (backlinks/ads) with Can before his week-long absence](https://fathom.video/share/R8SHzeue7Q24isy7Y8H4p-Ey_pikbokS?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue diagnosing SEO issues and implementing technical recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/R8SHzeue7Q24isy7Y8H4p-Ey_pikbokS?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
